# BeatMakerCard

## Summary
The BeatMakerCard is a card definition that provides a full-featured beat making and drum sequencing studio. It allows users to create and customize drum patterns, select from a library of drum kits, and control various parameters like BPM, swing, and master volume.

## Import
```javascript
import { BeatMakerCard } from '../beat-maker-studio-bfa35141-1cb4-4ba3-8f6c-5057dc4ca110/beat-maker/beat-maker';
```

## Usage as a Field
You can use the BeatMakerCard as a field within a consuming card or field. This will embed the full beat making studio experience into the parent component.

```javascript
@field beatMaker = contains(BeatMakerCard);
```

## Template Usage
Inside the template of a consuming card or field, you can display the BeatMakerCard by referencing the field:

```htmlbars
<@fields.beatMaker />
```

This will render the full BeatMakerCard interface, including the header, sequencer, and controls.
